The pawn structure looks like a French Defence without the blocking Black's light square bishop. :[[/3. exd5/]] simplifies the game, but won't prevent Black from playing e5. :[[/3. Nc3/]] increases central tensions, which can be released with 3...dxe4 or maintained with 3...e6 (transposing to [[wikipedia:French Defence|French Defence]]). ==Theory table== {{ChessTable}}.
